title: Untitled Discourses on Hate, Etc.
text:
## 11. Abbreviated Texts Beginning With Greed

“Of hate … delusion … anger … acrimony … disdain … contempt … jealousy … stinginess … deceitfulness … deviousness … obstinacy … aggression … conceit … arrogance … vanity … for insight into negligence … complete understanding … complete ending … giving up … ending … vanishing … fading away … cessation … giving away … letting go of negligence these eight things should be developed.” The Book of the Eights is finished.
